Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a virtual machine group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
